urdu transliteration text:
Karbala se jo meri simt hawaen ayen
Deir  tak giriya-o- matam ke sadayen ayen
english translation text: The breeze from karbala that touched meCarried the cries of the mazlooms beating themselves for a long while...

urdu transliteration text:
Asamanoon se jo takraie  hai faryad e Rubaab
Qabar –e Asghar pe baras nay ko ghatayen ayen
english translation text: When the cries of Rabab hit the skiesHer patience on Asghar's shahada made them cry...

urdu transliteration text:
Khaq urti rahi rastay mein bari dair talaq
Bibioun ko jo kabi yaad ridayen ayen
english translation text: The twinkling stars made her eyes heavy with sadnessWhen she recalled Asghar's innocent antics...

urdu transliteration text:
Phool mehkay jo baharoun mai to sucha main ni
In shaheedoun kay liya surgh qabayen ayen
english translation text: There were only dust flying on their long journeyAs the bibis remembered and cried for their coverings...

urdu transliteration text:
Nam – e – Abbas lia phir meray dil nai Mohsin
Phir salami ko doalam ki wafayen ayen
english translation text: When my heart remembers Maula Abbas a.s.; Mohsin,I salute his absolute loyalties of the worlds....
The blooming fragrance of spring flowers made me ponderHow the shaheeds on Ashura recieved their blood drenched red color....
